title: ScoutBoy player_season_metrics_v1
description: Long-format performance-metrics contract. One row per (player, season, metric). Player identity is joined at ingest time via (source_name, source_player_id) against player_source_ids.

source_name.description: Identity source to match (e.g. 'transfermarkt'). Must match player_source_ids.source_name.

source_player_id.description: Source player id. Must match player_source_ids.source_player_id.

metric_name.description: Canonical metric key from configs/metrics/canonical_metrics_v1.yaml (aliases accepted). Unknown names are quarantined.
